migrations_description: Analyze and prepare safe user migrations between media servers
migration_dry_run_hint: Analyze users, constraints and library mappings without changing any server.
migration_two_servers_required: Migration becomes available when at least two media servers are online.
migration_user_eligibility_hint: Blocking constraints must be resolved before a future campaign can run.
migration_library_mapping_hint: Name-based suggestions are never applied automatically.
migration_no_source_users: No linked users were found on the source server.
migration_analysis_notice: The analysis is read-only. Saving creates a reviewable draft; execution always runs in the background.
migration_reason.ambiguous_identity: Email belongs to another destination account
migration_reason.needs_library_mapping: At least one library is not mapped
migration_reason.needs_username: A username is required for the Jellyfin destination
migration_reason.destination_identity_mi: The linked destination account has no native identifier
migration_blocker.single_server: This optional feature becomes available when at least two media servers are online.
migration_blocker.shared_plex_account: All registered Plex servers use the same owner account and already share their users.
migration_blocker.shared_plex_pair: These Plex servers use the same owner account and already share their users.
migration_blocker.same_server: A server cannot be migrated to itself.
migration_blocker.server_offline: Both source and destination servers must be online.
migration_blocker.server_not_found: The selected source or destination server no longer exists.
migration_not_available: No useful migration path is available.
migration_servers_required: Source and destination servers are required.
migration_validation_servers_required: Please choose a source server and a destination server.
migration_shared_plex_not_needed: These Plex servers already share their users.
migration_campaign_audit: Read-only audit of the saved migration plan
migration_draft_no_execution: This campaign is a planning draft. It cannot create accounts, send invitations or change access.
migration_destination_only_notice: Destination creation runs first. Source accounts are never deleted, and source access changes remain a separate confirmed action.
migration_campaign_not_ready: Resolve every blocked user and unmapped library before starting.
migration_campaign_no_users: No eligible user remains to migrate.
migration_campaign_cannot_start: This campaign cannot be started in its current state.
migration_credentials_warning: These credentials are shown only on request. Store and deliver them securely.
migration_validation_not_available: This destination cannot be validated in its current state.
migration_phase3_source_access_hint: This separate action removes only validated users' source-library access. Accounts are never deleted.
migration_confirmation_hint: To confirm this optional action, enter the exact campaign name:
migration_confirmation_mismatch: The campaign name confirmation does not match.
migration_removal_ready_count: Users currently eligible for source removal
migration_copy_has_no_source_removal: Copy-only campaigns cannot remove source access.
migration_import_plan_hint: Reuse a reviewed VODUM plan. Servers and libraries are resolved locally and ambiguous matches are rejected.
migration_import_step_file: Choose a plan previously exported from VODUM.
migration_import_step_review: VODUM creates a new draft and resolves local servers and libraries.
migration_import_step_start: Review eligibility, then explicitly start the campaign.
migration_import_plan_safety: Importing a plan never starts a migration and never changes a media server.
migration_next_step_fix_blockers: This draft cannot start yet. Correct the blockers shown below, then create a reviewed draft.
migration_fix_blockers_hint: Blocked users usually require corrected email or identity data. Unmapped libraries must be assigned to a destination library.
migration_next_step_ready: This draft is ready. Review the summary, then start the campaign.
migration_start_explanation: Starting queues the migration worker. Destination accounts and access are handled first; source access is not removed automatically.
migration_next_step_running: The campaign is running in the background. This page shows its progress and any actions that require attention.
migration_next_step_completed: The destination phase is complete. Review the results and, when applicable, the optional source-access action.
migration_edit_draft_hint: Editing recalculates eligibility and replaces the saved preparation snapshot. No media server is changed.
migration_delete_draft_hint: Deletes only this unstarted preparation draft. Media servers and users are not changed.
migration_failed_users_retried: Failed migration users queued for retry.
migration_campaign_conflict: Another active campaign targets one or more of these users on the same destination.
migration_blocked_users_excluded: Blocked users excluded. The remaining eligible users can now migrate.
migration_limits_hint: VODUM migrates accounts and compatible access. The following data cannot be transferred reliably.
migration_limit.history: Playback history, progress, watchlists and avatars
migration_limit.provider_rules: Provider-specific rules without a reliable equivalent
migration_limit.sent_actions: Invitations and communications already sent cannot always be cancelled
migration_plan_file_required: Choose a migration plan JSON file.
migration_plan_too_large: The migration plan exceeds the 1 MB limit.
migration_plan_imported: Migration plan imported as a new draft.
migration_mapping_reason.name: Name match
migration_policy_compatibility_hint: VODUM policies remain attached to the canonical user; provider-specific rules may not have an equivalent.
task_description.migration_worker: Creates destination accounts and applies destination access without changing the source
about_description: VODUM is an advanced management tool for Plex/Jellyfin including sync operations, user management, libraries, logs, scheduled tasks and more.
admin_email_missing: Admin email is not configured. Please set it in Settings before sending test emails.
auth.reset_available_restart: Reset file detected. Restart the container now to reset the credentials.
auth.reset_explain_1: For security reasons, password reset requires local access to the server (Unraid / SSH / console).
auth.reset_not_available: Reset unavailable: no reset file was found on the server.
auth.reset_note_path: Tip: adjust the path according to the actual appdata location of your container.
auth.reset_step_1: Create a reset file on the server.
auth.reset_step_1_simple: Create a reset file on the server.
auth.reset_step_3: Open the reset page and enter the token, new email, and new password.
auth.reset_step_3_setup: Open the interface and redefine the admin email and password.
auth.reset_subtitle: Local access only • Not available remotely
auth.setup_admin_description: Set the admin email and password before configuring servers.
backup_restore_success_restart: Backup restored. Please restart the container to apply the restored database.
backup_retention_desc: Defines how many days backups are kept before being automatically removed.
backup_retention_count_desc: Only the newest backups up to this limit are kept.
brand_name_hint: Name displayed in emails (if empty, Vodum will be used).
campaign_test_failed: Failed to send test campaign email.
check_servers_description: Checks server availability and automatically updates their real name
cleanup_unfriended_processed: {count} user(s) were set to 'unfriended' because they no longer had access to any library.
comm_admin_email_missing: Admin email is missing. Set it first in Settings > General.
comm_allow_user_override: Allow users to override channel order in their profile
comm_channels_order_example: Example: Discord → Email means VODUM tries Discord first, then falls back to Email if needed.
comm_config_intro: Configure the available communication systems and how VODUM chooses the channel(s) when sending.
comm_days_before_help: Optional. Used by automations that trigger X days before expiration. Leave empty if not applicable.
comm_discord_help: Enable Discord sending and configure the bot token. Users need a Discord User ID in their profile.
comm_discord_token_help: Bot token used to send DMs. Make sure the bot has permission to message users.
comm_email_help: Enable email sending and configure SMTP. VODUM will use it when email is available for a user.
comm_general_help: Choose how VODUM selects the channel(s) when sending a notification or campaign.
comm_help_top: One interface, one set of templates/campaigns. VODUM chooses the channel(s) at send time based on your settings and each user’s availability.
comm_history_note: This is the real delivery history (channel actually used, status, and errors).
comm_key_help: Stable identifier used by automations (example: preavis, relance, fin). Cannot be changed later.
comm_missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
comm_password_help: Tip: for app passwords / OAuth tokens, prefer the provider’s recommended method.
comm_send_mode_help: FIRST: use the first available channel (user override if allowed, else global order). ALL: send on every available channel.
comm_subject_help: Used as the email subject and as the Discord message title (when applicable).
comm_template_key_exists: This key already exists. Please choose another one.
comm_templates_note: Tip: keep the key stable and avoid renaming it once used by tasks.
comm_test_discord_help: Validates the bot token (no message is sent).
comm_test_email_body: This is a test email sent from VODUM (Communications).
comm_test_email_help: Sends a test email to the admin email address.
comm_user_override_note: User override stays in the user profile. If disabled here, the global order is always used.
communications_subtitle: Campaigns, templates, delivery history, and communication settings.
confirm_restore: This will overwrite the current database. Continue?
confirm_restore_hint: This will overwrite the current database. Continue?
create_backup_desc: Immediately generates a SQLite database backup in the backup directory.
credits_text: Thank you for using VODUM! Developed with ❤️ to make your media servers easier to manage.
dashboard_subtitle: Overview of your users and servers
default_subscription_days_help: Number of days automatically applied to new users.
delete_after_expiry_days: Delete user X days after expiration
delete_after_expiry_days_help: Removes media server access after X days. Plex: the user is not deleted from Plex, only the library shares are revoked.
delete_user_after_expiry: Delete user X days after expiration
discord_campaign_note: Campaigns are sent to users with Discord set. If a server is selected, only users linked to that server are targeted.
discord_connect_first: Connect a Discord bot token first
discord_delete_bot_confirm: Delete this bot? Discord will be disabled.
discord_have_bot_help: Paste your bot token and VODUM will connect and fill the bot name automatically.
discord_have_bot_title: I already have a Discord bot
discord_help_1: To send DMs, VODUM needs a Discord bot token and each user's Discord ID.
discord_help_create_steps: Steps: Create an application → Add a bot → Reset token if needed → Copy/paste the token here.
discord_help_need_bot: Create a bot in Discord Developer Portal and copy its token
discord_help_need_user_id: Fill each user's Discord user ID (snowflake) in the user page
discord_note_tasks: Discord tasks are enabled/disabled automatically with the switch.
discord_saved_bot_help: Select a bot saved in the database. Its token will be used for sending DMs.
discord_token_help: Token is stored in DB. Regenerate it if it leaked.
discord_vodum_bot_help: VODUM will create a bot record. You still need to create the bot in the Discord Developer Portal and paste its token here.
discord_vodum_steps: 1) Create a bot in the Discord Developer Portal • 2) Copy the bot token • 3) Paste it below and click Activate.
dont_close_tab: Don’t close this window while the file is being uploaded.
grant_access_active_success: Access granted for active users of the server.
grant_active_users: Grant access to active users of the server
grant_all_users: Grant access to all users of this server
jellyfin_server_created_sync_planned: Jellyfin server created. Initial synchronization scheduled.
leave_blank_to_keep: Leave blank to keep the current value
verify_server_tls_help: Disable only for a trusted server using a self-signed certificate.
mail_history_desc: All sent emails (automatic user emails + campaigns).
mail_history_hint: Tip: purging also clears the history shown in user details and the campaign history.
mailing_disabled_help: Mailing is disabled. Enable it to configure SMTP, create campaigns or manage templates.
maintenance_restart_required: Please restart the container to resume using the application.
maintenance_restore_done_desc: The database has been successfully restored.
max_streams_override_help: If set to a value greater than 0, this number supersedes max_streams_per_user policies for this user. Empty or 0 = no override, policy applies.
merge.master.label: Master user (kept)
merge.preview.title: What will be moved
merge.title: User merge mode
merge.warning: This action is irreversible. The displayed user will be kept.
merge_confirm: Do you confirm merging this user?
merge_confirm_tip_text: Select the user to merge, then click “Merge” to load the preview. Then confirm the final step.
merge_confirm_warning: Warning: this action is irreversible. The target account will be merged into the master account.
monitoring.subtitle: Global Plex / Jellyfin overview
monitoring.table.title: Title
monitoring.title: Monitoring
name: Name
no_active_users_for_server: No active users for this server
no_backups: No backups found in the configured directory.
no_libraries: No libraries associated with this server.
no_tasks_found: No tasks found in the database.
no_users_for_server: No users currently have access to this server.
notification_system_order_example: Example: Discord → Email means VODUM tries Discord first, then falls back to Email if needed.
notification_system_order_help: VODUM tries each channel in this order. If a channel is unavailable or fails, it automatically tries the next one.
notifications_fallback_help: Used only if the primary channel is unavailable or fails.
notifications_order_help: Comma-separated channels, e.g. discord,email or email,discord. Used for fallback.
notifications_primary_help: Main channel used to send notifications.
policies_allow_local_ip_help: Local/private IPs will not count toward stream/IP limits.
policies_intro: Define rules to limit or control active streams in real time.
policies_max_value_help: Maximum allowed value for this rule.
policies_note_providers: Policies apply to Plex and Jellyfin servers depending on configuration.
policies_selector_help: Choose which session will be terminated if the rule is violated.
policies_warn_text_default: You have reached the allowed number of simultaneous streams.
recent_events_hint: Shows the latest events and actions recorded by Vodum.
restore_backup_desc: Upload a previously saved .zip, .sqlite or .db backup. Warning: current data will be overwritten.
server_users: Users with access to this server
settings_index_hint: Open a section to edit settings. Each section has its own Save button.
settings_section_general_desc: Language, timezone, admin credentials and brand name.
settings_section_notifications_desc: Delays before expiry + notification channel order (with fallback).
settings_section_subscription_desc: Default subscription duration and expiry behavior.
settings_section_system_desc: Scheduled tasks, maintenance and debug options.
installation_wizard_help: Run the guided setup again without changing existing data.
smtp_custom_help_intro: Select a provider to see detailed help
smtp_custom_help_requirements: For a custom SMTP server, enter:
smtp_custom_requirements_intro: For a custom SMTP server, enter:
smtp_custom_select_provider_help: Select a provider from the list to see detailed help.
smtp_custom_tls_ssl: TLS or SSL depending on the provider
smtp_gmail_password_warning: Regular Google passwords do not work for SMTP.
smtp_gmail_regular_passwords_no_work: Regular Google passwords do not work for SMTP.
smtp_help_custom: Use the SMTP parameters provided by your hosting provider or email service.
smtp_help_gmail: Use your Gmail address and an application-specific password (2-step verification required).
smtp_help_outlook: Use your Outlook/Office365 account. SMTP host is smtp.office365.com, port 587 with TLS.
smtp_help_yahoo: Use your Yahoo address with an application-specific password. Host smtp.mail.yahoo.com.
smtp_outlook_smtp_enabled: SMTP enabled in the Microsoft account
smtp_test_body: This is a test email to verify your SMTP configuration.
smtp_test_info: Test emails are always sent to the admin email address.
subject: Subject
subscription_apply_bulk_help: This takes a snapshot and replaces existing subscription policies.
subscription_apply_bulk_title: Apply template to all users of a server
subscription_apply_no_users: No users found for this server.
subscription_apply_replace_confirm: This will replace the current subscription for affected users. Continue?
subscription_apply_replace_warning: Warning: some users already have a subscription template.
subscription_expiry_mode_disable_help: On the expiration date, VODUM removes the user's library access on Plex/Jellyfin. The account is NOT deleted on the media server (Plex users are kept; only access is revoked).
subscription_expiry_mode_none_help: No action will be taken when the subscription expires.
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_help: On the expiration date, VODUM creates a strict, system-managed policy for this user (message displayed when the stream is stopped). After X days, VODUM removes the user's library access on Plex/Jellyfin. If the subscription is renewed, the policy is automatically removed.
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_title: Show "subscription expired" warning, then disable after X days
subscription_overridden_tooltip: User has overrides in profile (e.g. max_streams_override). Subscription is not the absolute truth.
subscription_reset_notice: Reminders and warnings will be reset if the new expiration date is later than the previous one.
subscription_template_delete_confirm: Delete this template? Users will be unassigned, existing snapshot policies remain.
subscription_template_name_exists: A template with this name already exists.
subscription_templates_policies_help: Build policies like in Monitoring → Policies
subscriptions_all_users_hint: This section displays all users across all servers
subscriptions_server_users_hint: This section displays only users linked to this server
support_text: If you need help or want to report an issue, please contact the platform administrator.
support_thanks: If you enjoy VODUM and want to support its development, you can buy me a coffee.
task.cleanup_logs: Automatic cleanup of logs older than 7 days
task_description.check_mailing_status: Checks whether emailing is enabled and automatically activates or deactivates related tasks
task_description.check_servers: Checks server availability and updates their real name.
task_description.check_update: Checks GitHub to detect if an update is available.
task_description.cleanup_backups: Deletes backups older than the retention period.
task_description.cleanup_unfriended: Detects friends without any library and marks them as unfriended.
task_description.disable_expired_users: Removes library access for expired subscriptions.
task_description.expired_subscription_ma: System: show "subscription expired" policy, then disable access after X days
task_description.import_tautulli: Import watch history from a Tautulli database (tautulli.db).
task_description.send_expiration_emails: Automatically sends pre-expiration, reminder and expired-account emails.
task_description.stream_enforcer: Enforces streaming policies and limits active sessions.
task_description.sync_jellyfin: Syncs Jellyfin accounts and library access.
task_description.sync_plex: Fetches users/libraries and updates the database.
tautulli_copying_db: Copying Tautulli database and starting the import.
tautulli_import_only_available_libraries: Skip libraries that do not exist in VODUM.
tautulli_import_options_desc: Choose how VODUM should import historical data from Tautulli.
tautulli_import_tip: Tip: you can logout — VODUM will keep the import result and show it later.
tautulli_keep_all_libraries_desc: Import all libraries even if they are not configured.
tautulli_keep_all_servers_desc: Import the Plex server referenced by this Tautulli DB even if it does not exist in VODUM. If enabled, VODUM will create an offline Plex server entry and import into it.
tautulli_keep_all_users_desc: Import users even if they do not exist in VODUM. They will be created as expired to avoid triggering emails/policies.
tautulli_libraries_policy_desc: Define how libraries should be handled during import.
tautulli_select_file_first: Please select a Tautulli database file first (.db).
tautulli_target_server_desc: Select which VODUM server the imported data will belong to.
template_test_help: A test email will be sent to the admin email configured in settings.
title: Title
user_notification_order_override_help: Notification delivery order for this user (if allowed in Settings).
user_notifications_can_override: User accounts can override the order
user_notifications_can_override_help: If enabled, the Email/Discord order can be set per user in the user profile.
user_saved_and_plex_sync_started: Changes saved and Plex synchronization started
username_display_help: VODUM display name. Plex/Jellyfin usernames are shown in the Media tab.
warn_then_disable_days_help: Minimum 1. Example: 7 means the user sees the warning policy for up to 7 days, then access is revoked.
communications.campaigns.discord_desc: Create and send Discord campaigns to your users.
communications.campaigns.email_desc: Create and send email campaigns to your users.
communications.channel_hint: Choose a channel to view related pages.
communications.config.allow_override_hel: If enabled, a user’s order override can change the routing.
communications.config.discord_desc: Configure the Discord bot token and default channel.
communications.config.mode_help: Choose how VODUM selects the channel when sending notifications.
communications.config.routing_desc: Configure the channel order and per-user overrides.
communications.history.discord_desc: See sent Discord messages and delivery status.
communications.history.email_desc: See sent emails and delivery status.
communications.templates.discord_desc: Manage Discord templates used by campaigns and automations.
communications.templates.email_desc: Manage email templates used by campaigns and automations.
communications.templates.note_body: Tip: keep templates generic, then personalize with variables in campaigns.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
comm_trigger_provider_help: Limit sending to Plex, Jellyfin, or both.
comm_days_after_help: For templates triggered after user creation. 0 = immediate, >0 = scheduled.
comm_trigger_help_bubble: 📌 Expiration → Days before. User creation → Days after (0 immediate / >0 scheduled). Use Plex/Jellyfin filter to target the right provider.
comm_delay_help: Choose whether the notification is sent before or after the trigger, then set the number of days.
invalid_expiration_date_format: Invalid expiration date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD.
invalid_renewal_date_format: Invalid renewal date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD.
web_security_desc: These settings control how the login session cookie behaves when VODUM is exposed through a web server.
secure_cookies_help: Recommended when VODUM is accessed through HTTPS. The session cookie will not be sent over plain HTTP.
cookie_samesite_help: Use Lax by default. Use None only if you need cross-site cookies, and only with HTTPS.
trust_reverse_proxy_help: Enable only if VODUM is behind a trusted reverse proxy (Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, SWAG, etc.). This allows proper use of X-Forwarded-* headers.
task_description.refresh_dashboard_quote: Builds the dashboard quote of the day.
server_delete_started: Server deletion started in background. This may take a little while.
server_delete_already_running: A deletion is already running for this server.
task_description.process_referral_reward: Qualifies eligible referrals, grants reward days and sends the notification.
referral_settings_intro: Configure here how referrals work in VODUM.
referral_settings_block_program_help: These settings define when a referred user is considered valid.
referral_settings_block_reward_help: These settings define how many days the referrer earns and whether a notification is sent.
referral_enabled_help: Fully enables the referral system in VODUM.
referral_qualification_days_help: Number of days the referred user must stay in an allowed status before the referral is validated.
referral_allow_referrer_change_before_qu: Allows correcting the referrer only before qualification.
referral_reward_enabled_help: When enabled, the referrer receives bonus days after qualification.
referral_reward_days_help: Number of days added to the referrer expiration date.
referral_auto_notify_reward_help: Automatically sends a message to the referrer when the reward is granted.
referral_eligible_statuses_help: The referred user must be in one of these statuses at the end of the qualification period.
referrer_picker_help: Choose a referrer from the list of active users. “No referrer” clears the selection.
user_referral_section_help: This section shows the current referrer, the referral status and this user's referred users.
referred_users_help: Users currently attached to this referrer.
subscriptions_settings_expiry_desc: Configure here the default subscription duration and what happens when a subscription expires.
comm_skip_never_used_accounts: Do not send communications if the account was never used
comm_skip_never_used_accounts_help: If enabled, no email, campaign or notification will be sent to users who never started playback.
comm_campaign_queued_summary: Campaign queued: {ok} users in queue, {failed} failed.
comm_vars_modal_subtitle: These placeholders can be used in communication templates.
comm_var_firstusername_desc: First name if available, otherwise the account username.
comm_var_email_desc: Main email address of the user.
comm_var_days_left_desc: Number of days remaining before expiration.
comm_var_server_name_desc: Name of the media server linked to the communication.
comm_var_server_url_desc: Server URL, mainly useful for welcome messages.
comm_var_login_username_desc: Login username sent to the user, mainly for welcome messages.
comm_var_temporary_password_desc: Temporary password sent to the user, mainly for welcome messages.
comm_var_subscription_name_desc: Name of the user's subscription template.
comm_var_subscription_value_desc: Value stored on the user's subscription template.
comm_var_subscription_duration_days_desc: Duration in days stored on the user's subscription template.
comm_var_old_expiration_date_desc: Previous expiration date before the change.
comm_var_new_expiration_date_desc: New expiration date after the change.
comm_var_expiration_change_days_desc: Absolute number of days added or removed.
comm_var_expiration_change_reason_desc: Reason for the expiration date change (gift, referral, manual update...).
comm_duplicate_disabled_subtitle: The template was saved, but it was automatically disabled.
comm_duplicate_disabled_help: Only one active template is allowed for the same logical slot. The new template was therefore saved as disabled to avoid conflicts.
task_description.send_pending_invite_rem: Queues reminders for Plex invitations that have not been accepted yet.
comm_campaign_create_then_send_hint: Create the campaign first, then send it from the edit screen.
remove_access_all_users: Remove access for all users of
bulk_remove_modal_subtitle: This action will be applied to all users on this server, except the owner.
bulk_remove_modal_warning: Warning: this action updates the database first, then triggers Plex synchronization.
delete_user_check_error: Unable to verify linked platforms. Local deletion is still possible, but the user may come back after the next sync.
delete_user_summary_no_links: No active Plex/Jellyfin link was found for this user in the currently configured servers.
delete_user_summary_links_found: This user is still linked to one or more platform accounts.
delete_user_summary_recreated: Warning: this user still seems to exist on an active platform, or the verification could not fully confirm removal. If you only delete the user from Vodum, they may return after the next sync.
delete_user_summary_not_recreated: No active platform account was found during verification. Local deletion is unlikely to come back on the next sync.
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_only_title: Show subscription expired warning and block playback
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_only_help: Recommended for Plex. The user keeps library access, but VODUM stops playback with an expired subscription message. Reactivation is immediate and does not require re-inviting the user.
subscription_expiry_mode_disable_warning: Warning: on Plex, removing library access may remove the user from shared users. Reactivation may require re-inviting.
plex_user_import_mode_help: Global mode preserves Vodum history and subscriptions. Shared-only mode only imports users actively shared on Plex servers.
create_user_modal_description: Create a user on Plex/Jellyfin and in Vodum, assign libraries, send welcome mail.
telemetry_modal_intro: Vodum can send anonymous aggregate usage statistics to help improve the application. In normal mode, sending is limited to once every seven days. In debug mode, it may be sent more regularly.
telemetry_modal_no_private_data: Telemetry is enabled by default, sends nothing until at least one Plex or Jellyfin server is configured, and uses a random installation identifier.
telemetry_modal_sent_data: The following information may be sent:
telemetry_modal_no_sensitive: The payload does not include usernames, emails, IP addresses, media titles, libraries or logs. The receiving service can derive the request country through Cloudflare.
remove_admin_to_delete: Remove administrator rights before deleting this user.
plex_owner_cannot_be_deleted: A Plex owner cannot be deleted.
now_playing_delayed_help: Live sessions are retained while background tasks delay the next media refresh.
comm_var_referral_reward_days_desc: Number of bonus days granted for the referral reward.
comm_var_referrer_old_expiration_date_de: Previous expiration date before referral reward.
comm_var_referrer_new_expiration_date_de: New expiration date after referral reward.
referral_cleanup_settings_help: Automatically expire and archive old referrals.
referral_auto_expire_pending_help: Pending referrals will automatically expire after their qualification deadline.
referral_auto_archive_rewarded_help: Rewarded referrals will be hidden from the main referral list after a delay.
referral_rewarded_archive_days_help: Number of days before rewarded referrals are archived.
referral_auto_archive_expired_help: Expired referrals will be hidden from the main referral list after a delay.
referral_expired_archive_days_help: Number of days before expired referrals are archived.
task_description.referral_cleanup: Automatically expire and archive old referrals.
expiration_date_override_help: Automatically extends the expiration date by 1 year when the warning period is reached.
monitoring.cards.live_sessions_no_sessio: No active sessions in the last
monitoring.cards.snapshot_fallback: Monitoring refresh in progress · showing the latest snapshot
subscription_set_as_default_help: This template will be automatically selected for every new user only if it is enabled.
task_description.cleanup_artwork_cache: Deletes old disk cache files for monitoring posters/backdrops.
task_description.cleanup_tautulli_import: Deletes old Tautulli diagnostic uploads and completed import records.
task_description.cleanup_data_consistenc: Removes orphaned and impossible cross-server access relationships.
task_description.warmup_artwork_cache: Preloads recent posters and backdrops to speed up dashboard and monitoring display.
task_description.db_integrity_check: Regularly checks SQLite integrity and foreign key consistency.
active_policies_help: Policies currently applied to this user, ordered by priority.
no_active_policies_for_user: No active policies are currently applied to this user.
subscription_plans_existing_hint: Quick view of duration, value and generated rules.
subscription_plan_editor_hint: Create a plan, define simple limits, then fine tune advanced policies only when needed.
subscription_plan_details_hint: Basic information used when this plan is assigned to users.
subscription_plan_rules_simple_hint: Simple mode creates standard policies behind the scenes. Switch to advanced only when you need full control.
subscription_limit_streams_hint: Limit how many sessions one user can run at the same time.
subscription_ip_addresses_hint: Limit how many different remote IPs a user can use.
subscription_bitrate_hint: Limit remote stream bitrate for this plan.
subscription_rules_generated_hint: Readable summary of the policies that will be saved for this plan.
subscription_plan_rules_advanced_hint: Advanced mode exposes the full policy editor for provider, server filter, priority, selectors and custom rules.
subscription_no_rules_hint: No rules yet. Enable a simple limit above or use the advanced policy editor.
comm_stream_blocked_template_locked: This system message cannot be deleted.
comm_stream_blocked_template_notice: System message used when VODUM stops playback through a policy. The trigger, media target, subscription target, and delay are locked.
comm_stream_blocked_required_by_expiry: Required because a subscription expiration warning/blocking mode is enabled.
comm_var_policy_name_desc: Name or type of the rule that triggered the block.
comm_var_policy_reason_desc: User-friendly reason sent to the user.
comm_var_media_title_desc: Title of the media being played.
comm_var_blocked_at_desc: Date and time of the block.
comm_var_stream_killed_desc: Complete summary of the stream stopped by VODUM.
comm_var_other_streams_desc: Multiline summary of the user's other active streams.
comm_var_other_streams_count_desc: Number of other active streams for the user.
comm_var_all_streams_desc: Multiline summary of all active streams for the user.
comm_var_stream_count_desc: Total active stream count observed for the user.
comm_var_ip_count_desc: Number of distinct IP addresses currently observed.
comm_var_policy_limit_desc: Configured limit of the policy that was exceeded.
comm_var_policy_observed_desc: Observed count that exceeded the policy limit.
comm_var_maximum_streams_desc: Maximum stream count when the policy limits streams.
comm_var_maximum_ips_desc: Maximum IP count when the policy limits IP addresses.
comm_var_brand_name_desc: Brand name configured in VODUM settings.
restore_in_progress_description: VODUM is uploading and restoring your backup. The application may restart automatically. Do not close this page.
restore_in_progress_warning: This operation may take several minutes depending on the backup size.
subscription_template_invalid_ip_streams: Max IPs per user cannot be higher than max streams per user.
usage_risk_upgrade_desc: Analyze enforcement events to detect suspicious usage and suggest better subscription plans.
usage_risk_enable_detection_help: Analyze kills, IPs, devices and repeated policy violations.
usage_risk_enable_detection_desc: Detect suspicious behavior without changing the current enforcement logic.
usage_risk_send_upgrade_suggestions_help: Allow VODUM to suggest a better subscription when usage regularly exceeds limits.
usage_risk_send_upgrade_suggestions_desc: Commercial suggestion only. It does not accuse the user of fraud.
usage_risk_send_stream_blocked_message_h: Enable the global Playback blocked template when a stream is blocked.
usage_risk_send_stream_blocked_message_d: Keeps the existing warn_only and warn_then_disable behavior, and can also enable the message from Usage Risk.
usage_risk_min_kills_before_suggestion_h: Minimum blocked streams before an upgrade can be suggested.
usage_risk_analysis_window_help: Number of days used to analyze recent usage risk.
usage_risk_suggestion_cooldown_help: Minimum number of days before sending another upgrade suggestion.
usage_risk_high_threshold_help: Minimum score for high risk. Must be higher than medium threshold.
subscription_upgrade_recommendation_help: Observed usage seems to regularly exceed the current subscription limits.
comm_template_duplicate_enabled: Cannot enable this template: an active template already exists with the same criteria:
wizard.mode_intro: Choose whether to configure a fresh instance or restore a complete VODUM backup.
wizard.fresh_hint: Guided configuration in a few minutes.
wizard.admin_intro: Create the account used to administer this VODUM instance.
wizard.general_intro: These settings affect the interface, emails, dates and scheduled tasks.
wizard.token_help: Use the Plex X-Plex-Token or Jellyfin API key, not the account password.
wizard.communications_intro: Choose Email, Discord, or both. These settings can be changed later.
wizard.templates_intro: Review the essential automatic messages. Open a panel to edit it without leaving the wizard.
wizard.templates_unavailable: Message templates are not available yet. You can continue and configure them later.
wizard.plans_intro: Create the plans that will be assigned to imported users.
wizard.expiration_intro: Only the essential expiration and usage-risk settings are shown here.
wizard.sync_running: User import is still running. Refresh this step to see newly imported users.
monitoring_policies_no_grouped_24h: No grouped enforcement in the last 24h.
monitoring_policies_no_user_history_24h: No enforcement found for this user in the last 24h.
monitoring_policies_unable_user_history: Unable to load user enforcement history.
monitoring_user_activity_help: Number of plays and total watch time over different periods
monitoring_user_no_map: No map available for this IP.
usage_risk_search: Search username, email, IP, device or policy...
usage_risk_no_mobile_browser: No mobile or browser device detected.
usage_risk_no_cases: No usage-risk case detected for the selected filters.
usage_risk_reason_fixed_devices_differen: Fixed devices linked to different public IPs
users_username_empty_help: If empty, the email prefix will be used.
users_no_libraries_server: No libraries found for this server.
monitoring_libraries_backend_missing: Backend not connected: the rows variable is missing.
monitoring_libraries_top_help: Only libraries with watched media in the selected period are shown.
monitoring_libraries_no_watched: No watched media found for the selected filters.
servers_first_setup_intro: Configure your first media server, or restore an existing VODUM backup.
servers_connect_help: Connect Plex or Jellyfin and start using VODUM.
servers_restore_help: Recover an existing VODUM installation from a backup archive.
policies_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to continue?
subscription_gift_single_help: Gift the subscription to one user only
referral_bulk_invalid_action: This bulk action is not valid.
contact_email_help: Used for application tests and notifications. By default, it may match the admin login.
app_security_help: Manage the admin login email, password and two-factor authentication.
two_factor_auth_help: Requires a temporary code in addition to the password when signing in.
wizard_totp_help: Use this secret in an authenticator app, then enter the current 6-digit code.
smtp_oauth_token_help: Use an SMTP OAuth2 access token for XOAUTH2 authentication. Leave empty to keep the saved token.
migration_jellyfin_auto_deliver_credenti: Uses an active Jellyfin user-creation communication template with {login_username} and {temporary_password}.
migration_credentials_delivery_skipped: Credentials delivery not queued: no active Jellyfin user-creation template
migration_multiple_destinations_help: Select one or more destination libraries. Leave all unselected to keep this source unmapped.
migration_mapping_override_hint: Empty selection means this user receives no destination for that source library.
migration_destination_rollback_hint: Removes only destination library access added by this campaign. Destination accounts are kept.
comm_var_policy_explanation_desc: Human-readable explanation of why playback was blocked.
comm_var_policy_limit_label_desc: Type of enforced limit: public IPs, simultaneous streams, bitrate, transcoding...
comm_var_active_streams_count_desc: Number of simultaneous streams involved in the block.
comm_var_active_streams_desc: Multiline list of active streams involved in the block.
comm_var_active_ips_count_desc: Number of detected public IP addresses.
comm_var_active_ips_desc: Multiline list of detected public IP addresses.
task_description.usage_risk_notification: Checks user activity risks and sends upgrade suggestion notifications when needed.
policy_explanation_max_ips_per_user: Your subscription allows up to {limit} public IP(s) at the same time. VODUM detected {observed} public IP(s) being used simultaneously.
policy_explanation_max_streams_per_user: Your subscription allows up to {limit} simultaneous stream(s). VODUM detected {observed} active stream(s) at the same time.
policy_explanation_max_streams_per_ip: The policy allows up to {limit} simultaneous stream(s) from the same public IP. VODUM detected {observed} active stream(s) from IP {ip}.
policy_limit_label_max_streams_per_serve: maximum simultaneous streams on this server
policy_explanation_max_streams_per_serve: The server limit is {limit} simultaneous stream(s). VODUM detected {observed} active stream(s) on this server.
policy_explanation_max_transcodes: The transcode limit is {limit}. VODUM detected {observed} active transcode(s).
policy_explanation_max_bitrate: The maximum allowed bitrate is {limit} kbps. This stream was above the allowed bitrate.
policy_explanation_ban_4k_transcode: This playback was stopped because 4K transcoding is not allowed.
policy_explanation_unknown: This playback was stopped because it matched policy {rule_type}.
comm_language_help: Default language for emails and user Discord messages. Independent from the admin interface language.
settings_communication_language_help: Default language for emails and user Discord messages. Independent from the admin interface language.
comm_template_language_help: Edits the subject and body for this template language only.
